markets.title: Markets
markets.subtitle: Global export reach
markets.content: Our products are present in over 50 countries across continents.

articles.title: Seafood market segments: Survey results across 5 European countries
articles.body: According to a survey across five European countries, consumers are increasingly focused on the origin and sustainability certifications of seafood products. This presents an opportunity for Vietnamese exporters to strengthen brand value and reputation.
bullets: European consumers prioritize products with sustainability certification.
Vietnamese pangasius fillet maintains competitive advantage in price and quality.

articles.title: Hai Huong achieves new BRCGS certification
articles.body: The company completed assessment and received the latest BRCGS Food Safety certification, reaffirming end-to-end quality control across the production chain.
bullets: HACCP processes applied throughout the factory.
QA team trained to the latest international standards.

articles.title: International seafood expo in Brussels
articles.body: Hai Huong showcased premium pangasius fillet and value-added products at Seafood Expo Global, attracting interest from many European partners.
bullets: Met with over 30 potential partners in the EU region.
Launched new value-added product line for B2B markets.

articles.title: ASC-certified farming area expansion
articles.body: The expansion project in Vinh Long strengthens sustainable raw material supply to meet growing export market requirements.
bullets: ASC farming area expanded by 120 hectares.
Real-time water quality monitoring technology deployed.
